message:
test(coordinator): add quality monitor trend and alert edge case tests

Cover generateAlerts for critical bugs, stale scans, consecutive
errors, declining trends, and no-alert scenarios. Add updateBugTrend
for insufficient history, improving, declining, and stable states.
Add updateTestTrend insufficient history, updateErrorTrend improving
and declining cases. Verify TrendDirection constants.

Coverage: coordinator 65.0→66.8%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
